meaning: n.痛苦,苦恼vt.使极苦闷,使极痛苦vi.感到痛苦
examples: He bellows, rends the air with anguish.
His anger and anguish clearly went deep.
Royall, 38, "has experienced mental anguish and loss of business reputation, " says his attorney Patrick Zummo.
Whether despite or because of their anguish and isolation, Judy and Sam remain very close.
